name: Rajesh Sharma
text: Bought a Samsung AC from EKTA FRIDGE. Amazing service, quick delivery, and free installation. The team was very professional and helpful!

name: Priya Patel
text: Best prices on LG washing machines! I compared everywhere and EKTA FRIDGE offered the best deal. Plus, the EMI option made it so easy.

name: Amit Kumar
text: Great experience buying a refrigerator. The website was easy to use, and customer support helped me choose the right capacity for my family.
